purpose: Root manifest for the Instructional Knowledge Engine. Maps all domains and documents; consumed by agents as a structural overview before traversing subdirectory manifests.

domains.purpose: Educational frameworks and learning science: PBL, Scaffolding, CLT, Bloom's Taxonomy, IT Education Strategies
Language fundamentals, paradigms, SE principles, programming pedagogy, full-stack competency map
Frontend stack, backend stack, web standards, infrastructure and deployment
Navigation and cross-reference indexes for agent graph traversal
Gap analysis, deprecation notices, and currency audits driving the research backlog
